secureValues.description: Placeholder secret. The Hello World datasource reads no configuration: its config editor renders static text and its backend ignores instance settings. This key exists only because a dsconfig entry must declare at least one field and the shared conformance suite requires at least one secureJsonData key. The plugin never reads it.

examples.description: The Hello World datasource requires no configuration. jsonData is empty and the placeholder secureJsonData.apiKey (which the plugin never reads) is left empty. This is a complete, working instance-settings payload.
